description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a paved area that could serve as a driveway or courtyard. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with large blue-tinted windows and glass doors along the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is a uniform gray, and the property includes a spacious paved area, possibly for parking or outdoor activities. The overall layout suggests a single-story residence with an emphasis on open, functional spaces. The architectural style is minimalist, with a focus on simplicity and horizontal lines.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat gray roof, large blue-tinted windows, and a spacious paved area, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large blue windows, and the expansive paved area in front of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main building and the smaller attached structure, with visible roof overhangs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the connecting paved area, and the secondary structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the smaller structure and the paved area, with less visibility of the main entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door with a flat overhang, no visible steps, and a minimalist approach.
